feedbackDesc: Have suggestions, bug reports, or feedback? Tell us.
featuresSubtitle: Threshold integrates scientific learning algorithms to maximize retention and predict your academic performance.
gradeEngineDesc: We predict your final grade using 4 combined metrics:
pa: PA (Current Average): Weighted average of all grades to date
ema: EMA (Exponential Moving Average): Gives more weight to recent grades — predicts your near-future trend
np: NP (Projected Grade): Combines what's already graded with your EMA for the remaining weight
delta: Δ (Delta / Momentum): Difference between projection and current average — shows trend
spacedRepetitionDesc: Two engines working in parallel to determine the optimal time to review each card:
sm2: SM-2 (SuperMemo 2, 1990): The classic algorithm validated by 30+ years of research
fsrs: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler, 2020+): Modern engine using 3 adaptive parameters (Stability, Difficulty, Repetitions) with retention prediction
qualityMap: Automatic quality deduction from response time:
flashcardTypesDesc: Three interactive card types to study any subject:
typeFlashcard: Classic Q&A: Front/back flashcard with optional hints and explanations
typeMultipleChoice: ECAES / SABER PRO: Multiple choice with pedagogical distractors
typeBoolean: True / False: Assertion-style questions with technical nuances
codeSupport: All card types support syntax highlighting for over 190 programming languages via highlight.js — currently we have 38 registered
codeSupportDetail: Any card containing code blocks uses syntax highlighting (190+ languages supported by highlight.js, 38 currently registered with aliases). Adding more is trivial.
analyticsDesc: Mastery percentage is computed from your interaction data:
atomicCards: Atomic Card Generator: Dense cards are split into micro-cards based on Cognitive Load Theory (Sweller, 1988), reducing cognitive overload and improving retention.
